verdict_history.phase: v1 baseline (scaffold + Unsplash cleanup + text-only sections)
verdict_history.notes: Replaced 3 broken Unsplash images (green tile hero, broccoli philosophy, spa mask lifestyle). 4→3 products. Photography sections: hero, products, CTA. Text-only sections: philosophy, lifestyle, ingredients. Code Lane 100 on first run — all 26 rules passed.

verdict_history.phase: v1.1 hero scale + sienna pullquote display (both majors fixed)
verdict_history.notes: Hero title scaled to clamp(3.5rem,10vw,10rem) with 4-line break and italic peach emphasis. Sienna pullquote scaled to clamp(3.5rem,8.5vw,9rem) with italic on key phrase. Both fixes addressed Visual Oracle major findings. APPROVE reached in 2 rounds — fastest to date.

verdict.notes: Second shipped entry to reach APPROVE. Fastest iteration: 2 rounds vs UDesigner's 7. Code Lane was clean from first scan. Visual majors were both typography-scale issues — no architectural or image-placement bugs needed.
